acceptanceReviewed.criterion: reports/qd/m4-dependabot-contract-check/completion.json replaces the unreachable commit SHA with the reachable PR #80 squash merge commit.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The Dependabot completion report commits[] entry is ce06158edb9393b8c2400ec944a44d61d56e1d59, and stale historical report SHAs exposed by hosted CI were normalized to durable commits reachable from HEAD.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: scripts/qd-reports-check.sh rejects non-empty commits[] entries that are not commits present in the current git repository.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: The checker keeps the existing 40-character lowercase hex jq predicate, then iterates valid commits[] entries and reports a file-scoped error when git cat-file -e "$sha^{commit}" fails or when the commit is not reachable from HEAD.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Existing qd reports pass the stricter check.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-commit-reachability-contract/commands.log records nix develop -c just qd-reports-check passing after durable SHA normalization.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: Linux validation evidence records just qd-reports-check, just check, and a temporary-copy negative smoke test for an unreachable full-length SHA.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: evidence/m4-qd-report-commit-reachability-contract/commands.log records fake-SHA and valid-object/non-ancestor negative smoke tests, nix develop -c just qd-reports-check, nix develop -c just check, and git diff --check.

acceptanceReviewed.criterion: No macOS-specific validation is claimed or required.
acceptanceReviewed.evidence: realWorldValidation.required is false and status is not_required for this repository-only checker change.

realWorldValidation.evidence: Repository qd completion-report metadata validation only; Linux validation passed and macOS validation is not required.
